text: Listen, you know what? Just tell them the truth. Tell them it wasn't. I can't believe you try to use me like this. What choice do I have? My back's against the wall. I can't do anything else. You can tell us the truth. I am, I swear. The money you get from the Connor Corporation, where does it come from? I'm sorry, if you want us to help you, you're gonna have to tell us the truth. You would.
